content.en:
Time passed slowly, and the Extreme Dao True River was transformed little by little by the energy of the primordial Black Sea.

Gradually, the true river of the Extreme Road also contains the breath of the Extreme Road.

The years are like traces, and as the years pass by 100 million and 100 million eternity, the energy of the Extreme Dao True River is getting more and more, and the cultivation environment is naturally getting better and better.

Finally, 4.6 billion eternal years have passed.

On this day, the Extreme Dao True River ushered in a complete transformation, 400 million eternal years earlier than the estimated 5 billion eternal years.

"Guys, there's no need to maintain the circle anymore!"

The voice of the Lord of the Golden Body resounded in the minds of many of the Three Realms Perfect Controllers.

The next moment, many perfect controllers of the Three Realms came out of the magic circle.

"Congratulations!"

"Congratulations!"

"Congratulations!"

One by one, the Perfect Masters of the Extreme Realm congratulated the Lord of the Golden Body and the Lord of the White Night.

This time, the promotion of the Extreme Dao True River greatly increases the probability of giving birth to a strong person in the future, and you can also obtain a large number of Extreme Dao resources in the future, which is a permanent thing!

All of a sudden, the other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers were envious.

Moreover, some of the Extreme Realm Perfect Masters asked the Golden Body Lord how they would arrange such a circle.

Of course, it is impossible for Jidao Mahe to reveal it at the moment, unless they pay an unimaginable reward.

Ye Tian didn't pay attention to this matter for the time being, he only cared about the remuneration.

Soon, the Lord of the Golden Body took Ye Tian and them to a void world.

There are thirteen Extreme Dao Monuments stored here, and every perfect controller of the Three Realms who comes to help can choose any of them to comprehend the 100 billion eternal years.

Moreover, every perfect controller of the Three Realms who comes to help can also get a lot of resource rewards and benefits.

After Ye Tian came here, he looked at all the thirteen Extreme Dao Monuments before choosing one Earthquake Extreme Dao Monument.

The powerhouses of the Extreme Dao True River didn't know that Ye Tian could copy the Extreme Dao Monument, so they didn't have any doubts about Ye Tian's move to observe the thirteen Extreme Dao Monuments.

"It's done, all the thirteen Extreme Dao Monuments can be copied, but there are only eight Extreme Dao Monuments that really help me, but they also make money!" Ye Tian said darkly.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's various extreme paths were making rapid progress.

After all, he had gained too many benefits this time, and so many Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments plus Extreme Dao Monuments allowed him to make rapid progress in many Extreme Dao.

As one of the Extreme Daos was realized to the Perfection Realm by Ye Tianshen, it was fed back to the Endless Extreme Dao, so that Ye Tian's Endless Extreme Dao was also constantly approaching the Dacheng Realm.

Before you know it, tens of billions of eternal years have passed.

At this time, many kinds of extreme paths in Ye Tianjing have been cultivated by him to the consummation realm, coupled with the extreme realm of space, defense, and light, this kind of background makes those who are perfectly in control of the extreme realm ashamed of themselves!

Moreover, Ye Tian's Cause and Effect Extreme Dao was finally about to reach the limit realm.

But what excites Ye Tian the most is that his Endless Extreme Dao has finally broken through from the peak of Xiaocheng to the realm of Dacheng under the feedback of many extreme Dao.

At this time, he was able to use the Endless Pole Dao of the Great Cheng level to impact the realm of the True Realm Perfect Controller.

"Now that the Endless Extreme Dao has reached the Dacheng realm, let's break through to the realm of the True Realm Perfect Controller!"

Ye Tian decided.

this day.

Ye Tian began to announce the retreat, but instead of breaking through the retreat at the Wudao Tower, he entered the Primordial Black Sea.

The energy level of the Primordial Black Sea was very high, and it was difficult to absorb and refine, but during this period of time, Ye Tian was also constantly studying the energy of the Primordial Black Sea, and finally created a secret technique that could absorb the energy of the Primordial Black Sea.

This secret technique, Ye Tian called it the Primordial Swallowing Technique.

This time, he was going to attack the Perfect Controller of the True Realm in the Primordial Black Sea, and the energy needed to break through could directly absorb the energy of the Primordial Black Sea, so that he could break through faster and save a lot of resources.

Moreover, Ye Tian found that the energy of the Primordial Black Sea was more advanced and pure, and the Extreme Dao True Body created by using the energy of the Primordial Black Sea would undoubtedly be better, and the foundation would be more stable.

Although he didn't stay long in the Primordial Black Sea, if he absorbed the energy of the Primordial Black Sea, it wouldn't take much time.

"Let's start breaking through!"

Ye Tian began to make a breakthrough in his Extreme Dao Void Body.

Rumble!!!!

The Extreme Dao Void Body began to metamorphose, evolving towards the Extreme Dao True Body.

At this time, Ye Tian directly escaped into the Primordial Black Sea, and under the effect of the Primordial Swallowing Technique, his body frantically devoured the energy of the Primordial Black Sea.

The speed of body transformation is too fast, I don't know how many times faster than in the outside world.

His aura skyrocketed every second, and his strength increased wildly.

Time passed little by little, Ye Tian absorbed too much of the Primordial Black Sea energy, and in less than a month, he completely condensed the Extreme Dao True Body.

As soon as the month came, Ye Tian was ostracized, but he had completely broken through, and the next thing was the time to stabilize the realm, and he didn't need much energy.

As a result, Ye Tian began to slowly stabilize the realm in the Origin Realm Sea, and it didn't take long for him to enter the Origin Black Sea again to continue to absorb energy and stabilize the realm.

Therefore, this time, Ye Tian only took a short period of time to completely stabilize the realm and become a true true realm perfect controller.

"Breaking through to the True Realm Perfect Controller, my strength has improved too fast, with my current physical strength, I am definitely not weaker than those weaker Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, and I have comprehended so many Extreme Dao, and I also have the Extreme Extreme Dao, and I have also created the top Extreme Dao Control Technique. My current strength shouldn't be weaker than that of an ordinary Extreme Realm Perfect Controller!" Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he hadn't yet fought against the true Extreme Realm Perfect Master, so he was only estimating his own strength.

And this breakthrough, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao will was greatly improved.

So, Ye Tian began to condense the layers of the Will Pagoda, only to see that he condensed from the sixth-layer Will Pagoda to the ninth-layer Will Pagoda in one breath, so he could not continue to condense.

"The nine-layer Will Pagoda, the defense power has been greatly improved, and my strength has also increased a lot!"

Ye Tian was very satisfied.

He had intentionally or unintentionally set out the number of layers of the Ancient Lord's Will Pagoda, that is, seven layers.

Now, he had condensed the nine-layer Pagoda of Will, and he had surpassed the Lord of the Ancients.

It is conceivable that condensing the Pagoda of Will in advance in the realm of the super-perfect controller will be too beneficial in the future.

"Next, I will practice slowly, first elevate the Extreme Dao True Body to the Perfection Realm, and then raise the Extreme Dao Will and Extreme Dao Ancestral Power to the Extreme Dao. There is also the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect that must also be raised to the extreme realm, so that the strength will be improved a lot!"

Ye Tian planned.
